name: Almond Shorts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugars, baking soda, vinegar, and vanilla extract in a large bowl.
2. Stir in eggs until well combined.
3. Cut butter into small pieces and incorporate them into the mixture.
4. Gradually add flour, a cup at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Fold in almonds.
6. Form the dough into a ball and divide it into five equal portions.
7. Roll each portion into a cylinder.
8. Optional: roll each cylinder in colored sugar.
9. Wrap the cylinders in wax paper and refrigerate overnight.
10. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
11. Cut each log into 1/4-inch slices.
12. Place the cookie slices on an ungreased baking sheet.
13. Bake for 8 minutes.
